introSection:
Comet II is a steel travelling roller coaster built by German manufacturer Schwarzkopf currently operated by Wade Shows in the United States.

This roller coaster was acquired by Wade Shows from Murphy Brothers Exposition in October 2013.
fullText:
Comet II is a steel travelling roller coaster built by German manufacturer Schwarzkopf currently operated by Wade Shows in the United States.

This roller coaster was acquired by Wade Shows from Murphy Brothers Exposition in October 2013.
